Add this to Gmail
  1. Adjust the photo with the sliders if you want a different crop.
  2. Click inside the white signature area below, then select only the signature (from the photo through the social icons) and copy (Cmd+C / Ctrl+C).
  3. In Gmail: Settings → See all settings → General → Signature. Click in the big box, Cmd+A then Delete to clear it, then paste (Cmd+V) → Save changes.

Important: Do not use Gmail’s Insert image button to add the whole signature. That turns it into one picture and breaks the layout, links, and font styling. Only paste with Cmd+V after copying from this page.

The headshot uses https://www.playerstall.com/images/monika-brownova.png so Gmail can load it. Gmail may show the name in Arial instead of Oswald; that’s normal.

Adjust photo crop

100%
48%
145%
